name: Holiday Roast of Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salt, black pepper, and ground ginger in a bowl and mix well.
2. Rub the seasoning mixture evenly over the lamb.
3. Place the lamb on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
4. Pour the coffee over the lamb.
5. Roast at 325°F for 30-35 minutes per pound or until a meat thermometer registers 175°F.
6. Baste the lamb frequently with coffee during roasting.
7. When done, transfer the roast to a heated platter.
8. Reserve 1/4 cup of fat from the drippings and discard the rest.
9. Pour the remaining drippings into a saucepan.
10. Mix the flour with some of the water in a separate bowl.
11. Stir the flour mixture into the drippings with the remaining water.
12. Cook, stirring constantly, until the gravy boils for 2 minutes.
13. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
14. Serve the lamb in a gravy bowl.
